chunks.title: Identity and Holiness
chunks.reason: Establishes the people's status as God's treasured possession.

chunks.title: Dietary Laws
chunks.reason: Covers clean and unclean animals, birds, and water creatures.

chunks.title: Tithing Instructions
chunks.reason: Details the annual tithe, consumption at the sanctuary, and provisions for distance.

chunks.title: Triennial Tithe
chunks.reason: Describes the third-year tithe for the Levite and poor.
